analysis.summary_en: Mixed-to-weak tape with sharp rotation: TSMC (+1.46%) and Hon Hai (+1.81%) lift the index, but broader semis are ugly — MediaTek -3.49%, UMC -6.36%, Largan -3.87%, Wiwynn -3.88%, ASE flat. TAIEX -0.43%. The standout signal: TSM ADR ripped +5.26% while 2330.TW only managed +1.46% — a 3.8pt gap suggesting local underpriced the overnight AI/capex narrative (CSP capex revised to US$660B for 2026). UMC shows an even wider 9.44pt divergence in the opposite direction (ADR up, local crushed -6.36%), which looks like a domestic-specific flush, possibly margin/utilization fears bleeding into mature-node names. EWT +3.18% confirms foreign bid on the Taiwan complex overall.
analysis.summary_zh: 盤勢分歧偏弱,輪動劇烈:台積電(+1.46%)與鴻海(+1.81%)撐住指數,但其他半導體慘烈——聯發科-3.49%、聯電-6.36%、大立光-3.87%、緯穎-3.88%,日月光持平。加權指數-0.43%。最關鍵訊號:TSM ADR大漲+5.26%,但2330.TW僅+1.46%,3.8個百分點的落差顯示本地盤未完全反映隔夜AI/資本支出利多(四大CSP將2026年資本支出上修至6,600億美元)。聯電的乖離更大(ADR漲、本地重挫-6.36%,差距9.44pt),看起來像台股本地特有的恐慌賣壓,可能是成熟製程毛利/稼動率疑慮外溢。EWT +3.18%確認外資對台股整體仍是買方。

key_stories.headline_en: Top-4 CSPs revise 2026 capex up to US$660B — record cloud capex cycle
key_stories.headline_zh: 四大CSP將2026年資本支出上修至6,600億美元,雲端資本支出創紀錄
key_stories.analysis_en: This is the core bullish driver behind TSM ADR's +5.26% move overnight. TSMC is the primary beneficiary of hyperscaler AI capex — leading-edge foundry capacity is sold out. Hon Hai (AI server assembly) +1.81% is consistent. ASE should benefit from advanced packaging (CoWoS-adjacent) but local print was flat/-0.11% vs ADR +1.18%. Local TSMC at +1.46% looks like it hasn't fully absorbed this — likely tomorrow catch-up if no offsetting news.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 這是TSM ADR隔夜大漲+5.26%的核心利多。台積電是雲端資本支出的首要受惠者,先進製程產能已滿載。鴻海(AI伺服器組裝)+1.81%一致。日月光理應受惠先進封裝(CoWoS周邊),但本地僅-0.11%對比ADR +1.18%。本地台積電+1.46%看來尚未完全消化此利多,若無反向消息,明日有補漲機會。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC local -6.36% vs ADR +3.08% — 9.44pt divergence, largest on board
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電本地-6.36% vs ADR +3.08%,乖離9.44個百分點,為今日最大
key_stories.analysis_en: Volume of 231M shares is massive — this is a capitulative flush, not orderly selling. With ADR green, the catalyst is almost certainly domestic/local: could be Chinese smartphone shipment downgrade (<600M units per DigiTimes) hitting mature-node demand, or sympathy with weak consumer electronics read-through. But the ADR/local gap is historically a mean-reversion setup. Mechanism: local retail panic on mature-node weakness while foreign desks (pricing the ADR) see the UMC de-rating as overdone. Watch for foreign net-buy data tomorrow. FALSIFIER: if tomorrow brings confirmed guidance cut from UMC or a specific Chinese foundry pricing collapse headline, this is not mean-reversion — it's front-running a fundamental downgrade.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 成交量2.31億股極為驚人,是恐慌性洗盤,非正常賣壓。ADR上漲代表催化因素幾乎確定來自本地:可能是中國智慧手機出貨下修(DigiTimes預估2026年低於6億支)衝擊成熟製程需求,或消費性電子疲軟的類股連動。但ADR/本地如此大的乖離歷史上偏向均值回歸。機制:本地散戶對成熟製程恐慌殺出,而外資(反映在ADR)認為聯電的評價下修過頭。明日留意三大法人買賣超。否證條件:若明日出現聯電正式下修財測或中國晶圓代工殺價確認新聞,則非均值回歸,而是基本面下修的提前反映。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek -3.49%, Wiwynn -3.88%, Largan -3.87% — Apple/smartphone supply chain sold off
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科-3.49%、緯穎-3.88%、大立光-3.87%——蘋果/手機供應鏈遭賣壓
key_stories.analysis_en: Three themes colliding: (1) China smartphone shipments to drop below 600M in 2026 — direct hit to MediaTek SoC volumes and Largan optics content; (2) Apple AI strategy being refocused on Siri/privacy read as underwhelming vs Samsung/Google AI pace; (3) Rotation out of non-AI-core semis into pure AI beneficiaries (TSMC, Hon Hai). Wiwynn -3.88% is odd since it's an AI server ODM — likely profit-taking after a run, or spillover from PC brand layoff headlines. Verdict: rational on MediaTek/Largan (fundamental read-through), overdone on Wiwynn if capex story holds.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 三個主題交匯:(1)2026年中國手機出貨低於6億支——直接衝擊聯發科SoC出貨量及大立光光學規格;(2)蘋果AI策略聚焦Siri/隱私被市場解讀為落後三星/Google;(3)資金從非AI核心半導體輪動至純AI受惠股(台積電、鴻海)。緯穎-3.88%較奇怪,因其為AI伺服器ODM——可能是漲多獲利了結,或受PC品牌裁員新聞拖累。結論:聯發科/大立光下跌合理(基本面連動),若CSP資本支出故事延續,緯穎則屬超跌。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR priced in the CSP capex upgrade and overnight AI tape; local lagged. Historically this gap closes within 1-2 sessions absent bad news. Watch tomorrow's open for gap-up attempt.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR已反映CSP資本支出上修及隔夜AI行情,本地尚未跟上。歷史上若無負面消息,此乖離通常1-2個交易日內收斂。明日開盤留意跳空走高。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Extreme gap — ADR +3.08% while local -6.36% on 231M shares. Either local is panic-selling ahead of a shoe yet to drop, or foreign holders see the thesis differently. Mean-reversion candidate, but size the risk — this gap is too wide to be noise.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 極端乖離——ADR +3.08%,本地-6.36%且成交量達2.31億股。要嘛本地在搶先反映尚未落地的利空,要嘛外資對此標的看法不同。屬均值回歸候選,但需控制風險——此乖離太大不會是雜訊。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Small-cap driver IC space — HIMX ADR flat-ish (-0.77%) while local -6.92%. Likely local panic on display/consumer electronics weakness (LG Display capex notwithstanding). Lower conviction due to lower liquidity and less ADR price discovery.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 小型驅動IC族群——HIMX ADR小跌(-0.77%)但本地-6.92%。可能是本地對面板/消費電子疲軟的恐慌(即便LG Display宣布增資)。因流動性較低、ADR價格發現力弱,此訊號信心度較低。
